Prerequisite: Permission of SPHL-Kinesiology department.

Repeatable to: 8 credits.

KNES799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits) KNES898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits) KNES899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits)

KORA - Korean

KORA499 Independent Study Korean (1-3 Credits) Independent study under faculty supervision. Prerequisite: Permission of instructor.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
